summary.concern: Stephanie and Marc Felton — 12 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 46 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 38 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 34 days past due with 12 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 22 days past due with 10 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **12 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 9. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **18 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** The oldest overdue task is 9 days past due with 6 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 22 days past due with 5 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **18 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.
**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 3 overdue payments — schedule work is fine but material delays will hit soon if these aren't processed.

151 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **78 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 37 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$0 in payments going out this week** across 36 tasks — make sure funds are available. Heavy week ahead for Katie Holmes & Sean Springs and Kyle Aubry - Project 01 — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 10. Keep the momentum going.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 6 overdue (oldest: 9d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **7 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 20 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 5 overdue (oldest: 22d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 upcoming unassigned. 13 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 2 overdue — oldest first. **8 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 33 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 4. Keep the momentum going.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 12 overdue (oldest: 34d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **14 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 21 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 3 payment tasks need Operations attention.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 4 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 8. Keep the momentum going.

**Ginger Brown:** 10 overdue (oldest: 22d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **12 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 9 overdue — oldest first. **18 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 2 overdue — oldest first. **18 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 26 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
